item.title: Benfica's Gianluca Prestianni Faces Suspension Amid Vinicius Racism Investigation
item.description: Benfica winger Gianluca Prestianni has been provisionally suspended by UEFA as an investigation into the events of a Champions League clash with Real ...

item.title: Would Christian Pulisic Be Right Fit To Replace Liverpool's Mohamed Salah?
item.description: Liverpool cult hero Emile Heskey believes that USA star Christian Pulisic could be a useful replacement for Mohamed Salah at Anfield.

item.title: Top 10 CFB Coaches: Whittingham in Top 10? Big Ten Dominates Top 4
item.description: Who are the best coaches in college football? Joel Klatt thinks No. 1 is an easy pick, but there's some room for debate after that.

item.title: 2025-26 Men's March Madness Odds: Michigan Favored; Duke, Illinois Move Up
item.description: Michigan and Arizona continue to go back and forth atop the oddsboard, but two other teams are moving up. Here are the latest lines.

item.title: Meet the 10 INDYCAR Teams Competing for the 2026 Championship
item.description: Here's a look at each INDYCAR organization's 2026 lineup and outlook as an exciting new season embarks on Sunday.
